actions.title: Complete FYEC100 knowledge base review
actions.notes: Record reviewer name, review date, and approval status before wider student use.

actions.title: Configure Moodle origin for hosted iframe testing
actions.notes: Set MOODLE_ORIGIN to the approved Moodle HTTPS origin before hosted pilot use.

actions.title: Configure admin access token before hosted pilot
actions.notes: Set ADMIN_ACCESS_TOKEN and keep /admin and /api/admin/* behind approved access controls.

actions.title: Review Moodle block scaffold in a Moodle test environment
actions.notes: Confirm installation path, block behavior, and fallback link before deciding whether to move beyond iframe testing.

actions.title: Complete project-team pilot sign-off
actions.notes: Update data/pilot-signoff.json after the review meeting.

actions.title: Decide iframe, Moodle block, or LTI path for next stage
actions.notes: Use pilot evidence and LMS administrator review to decide the next integration path.

governanceNotes: Use this register to track project-team follow-up actions after pilot review meetings.
Update action status manually during Phase 2.
Do not store student records, grades, IDs, or private student information in this file.
